Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, Elizabeth asked me[n]to get a variety of drinks for her...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I think I have everything now. I should[n]bring them to her before I forget...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}They have a variety of drinks.[n]Maybe I'll buy some next time...[n]{f 1 1}
